---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Structure des ménages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)

#Chargement des données de ménages
res_deb <- read_dta("data/res_deb.dta")
res_m_a <- read_dta("data/res_m_a.dta")
  

```

## Caractéristiques socio-démographiques des ménages

```{r}
# Tableau de répartition des ménages selon les codes observatoires
tab <- res_deb %>%
  group_by(j0) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(j5), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(Percent = n / sum(n) * 100) 

tab_print <- tab %>% 
  mutate(j0 = as.character(j0)) %>% 
  rename(Observatory = j0) %>%
  tibble::add_row(Observatory = "Total", n = sum(tab$n), Percent = sum(tab$Percent, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  mutate(Percent = if_else(Observatory == "Total",
                           sprintf("%.0f%%", Percent),
                           sprintf("%.1f%%", Percent))) 

```

Calculons la taille des ménages par observatoire

```{r}
hh_size <- res_m_a %>%
  group_by(j5) %>%
  mutate(hh_size = n()) %>%
  select(j5,hh_size) %>% 
  distinct(j5,hh_size)
  

```
